# EuroSpa

> Licensed European massage centre in Barsha Heights, Dubai. Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone, aroma and bamboo fusion massage by expert European therapists. Open daily 10:00 to 02:00. Booking is by WhatsApp.

## Location and contact
- Address: Ramada by Wyndham Hotel, 2nd floor, Barsha Heights (Tecom), Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Hours: every day, 10:00 to 02:00
- WhatsApp (booking): +971 56 227 9600
- Phone: +971 50 227 1889
- Email: dubaimassagetreat@gmail.com
- Website: https://promo.eurospa.ae/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eurospa.dxb/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/eurospa.dubai/

## Services and prices (60 min / 90 min, AED, inclusive of 15% service charge, 7% municipality fee and 5% VAT)
- Tension Relaxation Massage (Swedish): 450 / 650
- Deep Muscle Relaxation Massage: 500 / 700
- Essential Oil Aroma Massage: 300 / 520
- Thai Tranquility Therapy (Lomi Lomi): 570 / 850
- Hot Stone Enjoyment Massage: 570 / 850
- Double Relaxation Massage: 940 / 1320
- Indulgences for Two: 940 / 1320
- Signature Bamboo Fusion Massage: 570 / 850
- Traditional Thai Stretching Massage: 570 / 850

## Notes
- All bookings go through WhatsApp; there is no online payment.
- A 24 hour notice is required for changes or cancellations.
- Therapists: Alexia, Dana, Elena, Mila, Kate, Marina, Alex.
